title: Dungeons and Taverns Antique Atlas 4 Compat
description: This Resource Pack adds compatibility between Dungeons and Taverns and Antique atlas 4 Auto-Marking
body:
# This Is Very W.I.P!!

This Resource pack enables Auto-Marking For Dungeons And Taverns Structures

Right now the only structures that have auto marking enabled are:
- Spruce Taverns
- Oak Taverns
- Birch Taverns
- Desert Taverns
- Cherry Taverns
- All Shrine Levels

More structures will soon be added!
